[[Georgia Rucker]] |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |release date=[[November]] [[1997]] {{C|First printing}}''Star Wars Kids'' 5 |subscribers=[[January]] [[1998]] {{C|Release}}''Star Wars Kids'' 5 was released packaged with ''[[Star Wars Missions 5: The Hunt for Han Solo]]'', for which the [[StarWars.com]] Cargo Bay [https://web.archive.org/web/20040803144738/http://cargobay.starwars.com/webapps/cargobay/item-detail/617 listed] a release date of [[January]] [[1998]]. ''The Hunt for Han Solo'' additionally denotes a [[January]] 1998 release date. |pages=26 |isbn=0-590-12792-6 |issn= |genre= |issue=5 |series=[[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997)]] }} '''''Star Wars Kids'' 5''' is the fifth issue of [[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'']] magazine. It was published by [[Scholastic]] and released in [[January]] [[1998]]. Issue 5 included part five of the serial [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[The Rebel Thief]]'', written by [[Ryder Windham]]. ''Star Wars Kids'' 5 was available exclusively to subscribers of Scholastic's ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]], which arrived as monthly continuity packages via direct mail. Each package included a new ''Star Wars Kids'' magazine issue and the latest ''Star Wars Missions'' adventure book. ''Star Wars Kids'' 5 came packaged with the game's fifth adventure book, [[Star Wars Missions 5: The Hunt for Han Solo|''The Hunt for Han Solo'']]. {{Magazine-stub|issue}} ==Contents== ===Features=== *'''"[[Who Is That Alien?]] Mon Calamari & Bith"''' by [[Bill Smith]] *'''"Space Science: Comets"''' by [[Terry Ray Hiller]] *'''"[[Meet...|Meet Princess Leia]]"''' by [[Pamela Roller]] *:Carrie Fisher Proves That Girls Can Be Rebel Heroes Too! *'''"[[Star Wars Kids Feature Planet|On Our Planet: Alderaan]]"''' by [[Terry Ray Hiller]] *'''"[[The Rebel Thief|''The Rebel Thief, Part 5'']]"''' by [[Ryder Windham]] ===Departments=== *'''"A-maze-ing Universe"''' *'''"''Star Wars Missions'' Bonus Page"''' *'''"Brain Blasters"''' *:...For the ultimate ''Star Wars'' fan. *'''"Yoda's Puzzle Pages"''' *'''"Who Does That?''' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{KidsNav|4|6}} {{Interlang |fi=Star Wars Kids 5 }} [[Category:Star Wars Kids (1997) issues|05]]
